task_description: Build Musicalizer — a greenfield Python CLI app for AI song lyric generation, evaluation, and auto-improvement, optimized for Suno AI output format.

patterns.provider_pattern: Strategy pattern via abstract LLMProvider base class; async generate() method; factory function for instantiation
patterns.model_pattern: Pydantic BaseModel for all data structures; used both for validation and LLM structured output schemas
patterns.preset_pattern: JSON files in presets/ directory; loaded and validated against Preset Pydantic model; hyphen names in CLI, underscore names in files
patterns.async_pattern: All provider and business logic methods are async; Click CLI bridges with asyncio.run()
patterns.auto_improve_pattern: Karpathy AutoResearch: Generate → Evaluate → Reflect → Regenerate with plateau detection and best-score tracking

existing_implementations.description: Greenfield project — no existing implementations. All patterns defined in spec.md.
